repo_prior_art.cite: CausalSmith/doc/API.md Section 3 reports no completed ExactID policy-commutator catalogue entry

published_prior_art.cite: Kennedy2019JASA and DiazWilliamsHoffmanSchenck2023JASA give longitudinal identification for IPSI/LMTP classes; the ordered two-sum composition is a routine g-formula specialization
YoungHernanRobins2014EM and WenMarcusYoung2023SMMR motivate natural-value/observed-process interventions but do not state an IPSI-LMTP commutator phase factorization
SarvetWanisYoungHernandezAlejandroStensrud2023Biometrics distinguishes natural and assigned treatment values for limited-resource IPSIs but does not give this finite noncommutation witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship comparison cites YoungHernanRobins2014EM and WenMarcusYoung2023SMMR without a section/equation/page anchor tying them to the specific zero-phase gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The headline promises positive functions C_{delta,gamma} and W_{a,delta,gamma} plus a phase boundary, but Exhibit 9.1 computes only Delta for one witness, not the advertised factorization object.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The no-feedback reduction is false under the stated graph: with q1=q0 but any direct A1-to-Y mean contrast, Theorem 1 gives Delta=(mu(kappa(p))-kappa(mu(p)))(V1-V0) nonzero.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The no-effect-modification reduction is false as stated: d_{a1}=d_{a0} does not eliminate direct A1 outcome contrasts or A1-dependent downstream r_{a l} terms in V1-V0.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed factorization omits residual baseline-outcome and direct A1 effect terms allowed by the locked SWIG A1 -> Y and by Section 3's unrestricted m_{a l b}.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Either add assumptions excluding direct A1 outcome effects and A1-dependent baseline outcome components, or include an explicit residual term in the commutator decomposition.

Compute the exact algebraic decomposition from Theorem 1 first as Delta=(mu(kappa(p))-kappa(mu(p)))(V1-V0), then decide whether a nontrivial feedback/effect-modification phase remains after legitimate restrictions.
Add a worked Exhibit 9 block computing C_{delta,gamma}, W_{a,delta,gamma}, and the zero condition on a nondegenerate law, not just the nonzero Delta witness.
Anchor the flagship prior-art gap to exact locations in YoungHernanRobins2014EM, WenMarcusYoung2023SMMR, Kennedy2019JASA, and DiazWilliamsHoffmanSchenck2023JASA.

recommended_next_step: Pivot or redraft around the exact Delta=(ordered first-period weight difference)*(downstream value contrast) identity; the current phase conjecture fails its own sanity reductions.
